description: Transfer destination must be different from the source farm.
conditions: quando o lote possuir um evento de output para a fazenda de destino

description: Transfer date cannot be before the animal's entry date on the farm.
conditions: exceto para animais comprados gestantes com data de transferência retroativa autorizada

description: Cannot update transfer if the animal has already been received at the destination.
Cannot delete transfer if animal has been received at destination farm.
conditions: quando o lote possuir um evento de output confirmado na fazenda destino
